n: Mission: The Further Adventures of Elladan & Elrohir, Chapter 1

steps.t: You should talk to Elladan to start searching the Ford of Bruinen together.
At the ford, you discovered the corpses of three horses that belonged to the Black Riders. You should discuss these findings with Elladan.
You have made your way towards the Blooming Fens. Elrohir must be here somewhere.
You have helped Elrohir successfully fend off a swarm of insects. You should talk to him.
There seems to be a black cloak floating near the horses. You should examine it.
